info.title: D-Sports API
info.description: Public API for the D-Sports fan engagement platform (PWA backend). Most endpoints require Clerk Bearer authentication.

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Admin panel endpoints for user, team, pack, and collectible management

tags.name: Cron
tags.description: Scheduled cron jobs for leaderboard resets and trend syncing

tags.name: Misc
tags.description: Image proxy, crypto prices, upload, feedback

tags.name: Auth and onboarding
tags.description: Domain grouping for auth, profile, onboarding, and identity flows

tags.name: Social and locker room
tags.description: Domain grouping for social feed, follows, and community interactions

tags.name: Gamification
tags.description: Domain grouping for quests, leaderboards, points-facing outcomes, and rewards

tags.name: Commerce and purchases
tags.description: Domain grouping for checkout, cash balance, webhooks, and store purchase flows

tags.name: Collectibles and packs
tags.description: Domain grouping for pack lifecycle and collectible inventory

tags.name: Wallet and web3
tags.description: Domain grouping for wallet and crypto-support operations

tags.name: Moderation and reporting
tags.description: Domain grouping for user-facing report submission and moderation-adjacent endpoints

tags.name: Platform and infrastructure
tags.description: Domain grouping for utility, infrastructure, and platform support endpoints

post.description: Generates a sign-in token for the authenticated user. Used by native app: pass Bearer token, get ticket for WebView sign-in.
Validates the Bearer token.

get.description: Redirects to login.

post.description: Signs out the user.

get.description: Redirects to mobile auth. Query: provider, redirect_uri.
Callback with redirect_uri. Returns token or error in redirect.
Verifies Bearer token from native app.
Returns platform overview stats including user growth, post counts, quest completion rates, and top leaderboard entries. Requires admin role.
Paginated user list with search, sorting, and role information. Requires admin role.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by email, name, or handle

get.description: Returns detailed user information including roles and counts. Requires admin role.

200.description: { success, data: { id, email, name, handle, roles, _count } }

delete.description: Deletes a user account. Cannot delete yourself. Requires admin role.

post.description: Grant or revoke admin role for a user. Requires superadmin role.

get.description: Lists all teams or only teams the current user administers.

parameters.name: my
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to return only your teams

post.description: Creates a new team. Requires admin role.

get.description: Returns team admin members. Requires team admin or superadmin role.

post.description: Adds a user as a team member with a given role. Requires team owner/admin or superadmin.

patch.description: Changes a team member's role. Requires team owner or superadmin.

delete.description: Removes a member from the team. Cannot remove the last owner. Requires team owner or superadmin.

get.description: Lists collectibles for a team, optionally filtered by status.

post.description: Creates a new collectible. Requires admin role.
Performs an action on a collectible. Currently supports 'publish'.

get.description: Lists packs for a team, optionally filtered by status or archived flag.

post.description: Creates a new pack. Requires admin role.
Performs an action on a pack: publish, archive, restore, addCollectible, or removeCollectible.

collectibleId.description: Required for addCollectible and removeCollectible actions

get.description: Returns a report of all teams and their admin status, including orphaned teams with no admins. Requires admin role.

200.description: { success, data: { currentUserId, totalTeams, accessibleTeams, orphanedTeams, teams } }

post.description: Assigns the current admin as owner of orphaned teams. Optionally target a specific team by ID. Requires admin role.

teamId.description: Optional. Fix a specific team instead of all orphaned teams.

post.description: Triggers a league data synchronization. Requires admin role.

get.description: List all teams with enriched stats: fans, totalPoints, rank, lastWinner, isOfficial, league, themeColor, leaderboardId (per-team board when provisioned), leagueInfo, leagueColors, plus _count { packs, collectibles }.
Teams the authenticated user follows.

post.description: Body optional: { type?: 'followed' | 'fan' }.

get.description: Returns all leagues with team counts. Optionally filter by country.
Returns leaderboard entries. Query: leaderboardId (number) or teamId (string); omit for global.
Server-sent events stream. Query: leaderboardId.
Total users, total points, last winner.

post.description: Ends the current leaderboard season and starts a new one. Requires admin role.
Body: { paymentMethod: 'crypto' | 'dsports-cash' }.
Body: { purchaseId }.

get.description: suggest=1: suggested users (auth). No id: current user (auth). id and/or handle: public profile.
Returns a paginated list of users with basic profile info and stats. Rate limited to 30 requests per minute.
Checks whether a username (handle) is available.

post.description: Onboarding payload.

get.description: Internal/debug card settings endpoint.

post.description: Internal/debug card settings mutation endpoint.

password.description: Optional password for explicit re-authentication prior to deletion.

get.description: Query: category (optional) for QuestCategory; else active quests.

post.description: Allows a superadmin to force-claim a reward on behalf of the platform. Requires superadmin role.

delete.description: Removes a reward entirely. Requires superadmin role.

get.description: Query: userId (admin impersonation).
Scheduled job that ends the current leaderboard season and starts a new one. Authenticated via CRON_SECRET Bearer token.
Scheduled job that snapshots leaderboard point totals for trend tracking. Authenticated via CRON_SECRET Bearer token.

post.description: Handles RevenueCat purchase events. Use Authorization: Bearer with REVENUECAT_WEBHOOK_SECRET.
Triggers a league data synchronization via webhook. Authenticated via x-webhook-secret header matching LEAGUES_WEBHOOK_SECRET.
Internal maintenance route for quest/points reconciliation.

bearerAuth.description: Clerk session token. Use Authorization: Bearer <token>.
